name: com.unity.formats.fbx
description: The FBX Exporter package enables round-trip workflows between Unity and 3D modeling software. Send geometry, Lights, Cameras, and animation from Unity to Autodeskﾂｮ Mayaﾂｮ, Autodeskﾂｮ Maya LT邃｢, or Autodeskﾂｮ 3ds Maxﾂｮ, and back to Unity again, with minimal effort.
